## Summary

Describe the change and the problem it solves.

## Validation

- [ ] `pytest -q`
- [ ] `ruff check src tests`
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests`
- [ ] Demo generation completed when orchestration, rendering, or policy changed

## Safety and grounding impact

- [ ] No safety, RoE, allowlist, citation, or factuality control is weakened
- [ ] New external sources are explicitly justified and allowlisted
- [ ] Model-schema changes include tests and trace compatibility notes

## Documentation

- [ ] README, architecture, changelog, and examples are updated where applicable
